text: The appointments of the appointive members shall be made effective as of the effective date of this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 6. New Motor Vehicle Board [3000 - 3085.10]
#### Article 1. Organization of Board [3000 - 3016]
##### § 3002

The appointments of the appointive members shall be made effective as of the effective date of this article.

*(Added by Stats. 1967, Ch. 1397.)*

subsections.text: The appointments of the appointive members shall be made effective as of the effective date of this article.
